/usr/bin/cc -g -O0 -Wall -Wextra CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/auth_db.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/config.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/file.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/http.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/server.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/threadpool.c.o -o web  -lpthread -lsqlite3 -lssl -lcrypto
